Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社2座2社の計4座4社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[御井郡|三井郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座）{{Tnavbar|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|11=筑後国三井郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''高良玉垂命神社'''||takanranotamatareno-

Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社2座2社の計4座4社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[御井郡|三井郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座）{{Tnavbar|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|11=筑後国三井郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''高良玉垂命神社'''||takanranotamatareno-

Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社2座2社の計4座4社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[御井郡|三井郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座）{{Tnavbar|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|11=筑後国三井郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''高良玉垂命神社'''||takanranotamatareno-

Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Chikugo Province|Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（いずれもMyojin Taisha社）・小社2座2社の計4座4社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} ==Shikinaisha removed from templates== ==Shikinaisha List Templates to be Depopulated== {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[御井郡|三井郡]]''' 3座（大2座・小1座）{{Tnavbar|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|筑後国三井郡のList of Shikinaisha|11=筑後国三井郡の式内社一覧|mini=1|style=float:right}} |- |'''高良玉垂命神社'''||takanranotamatareno-

revision.text:
{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}
On this page we will also cover the {ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The ''Engishiki'' counts **4 shikinaisha** in the province – **2 shosha** and **2 taisha**.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:22, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 23:43, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Global !! Prov !! District !! Name !! Kana !! Rank !! Shrine DB !! Celebration !! Seats !! Subtype !! Parent shrine !! [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 3 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:40, 4 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:40, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11602803]]
[[:ja:筑後国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:37, 12 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Chikugo Province''' or the list of shrines in [[Chikugo Province]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Chikugo Province]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 4 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 2 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank |- | 1 || {{ill|Kōra taisha|WD=Q715647}} || こうらたいしゃ || Myojin Taisha |- | 2 || {{ill|Iseamaterasumioyano shrine|WD=Q135041474}} || -アマテラスミオヤノ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 3 || {{ill|Toyohimeno shrine|WD=Q135041475}} || || Myojin Taisha |- | 4 || {{ill|Miseno- shrine|WD=Q135041476}} || ミセノ- || Shikinai Shosha |}

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Chikugo Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 4 Shikinaisha in the province – 2 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Chikugo Province]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 4 Shikinaisha in the province – 2 Shikinai Shōsha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.
